title: Preparation and Study of Hydroxytriazenes as Analytical  Reagents. Part III. 3.Hydroxy-1-p-tolyI-3-methyltriazene as a Reagent for Palladium and Copper
author: H. K. L. Gupta
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: 3-Hvdrorv-1-p-tolyl-3-methyltrilzene it found to be a highly selective reagent  for  the gravimetric deter­minatim of palladium and copper and for their separation from a large number of elements by direct weighing in the  p H range f torn 1.0 to 6.0 and 3.2 to 6.0 respectively. The reagent offers a positive advantage over other hydroxytriazenes as it is fairly soluble in hot water and excess of   it used during the precipitation of the complex can be easily washed. A comparative study of the reactions of 3-hydrory-1-p-tolyI-3-phenyltriazene and­ 3-hydroxy1-p-tolyl-3-methyltriazene has been made.
steps_raw: 3-Hvdrorv-1-p-tolyl-3-methyltrilzene it found to be a highly selective reagent  for  the gravimetric deter­minatim of palladium and copper and for their separation from a large number of elements by direct weighing in the  p H range f torn 1.0 to 6.0 and 3.2 to 6.0 respectively. The reagent offers a positive advantage over other hydroxytriazenes as it is fairly soluble in hot water and excess of   it used during the precipitation of the complex can be easily washed. A comparative study of the reactions of 3-hydrory-1-p-tolyI-3-phenyltriazene and­ 3-hydroxy1-p-tolyl-3-methyltriazene has been made.
